sys_ui_page.html:
var appName = "Alation ServiceNow Integration";

$[appName] - App Privacy Policy

This page describes how this application handles data.

Data collected and processed

  • Incident identifiers: sys_id, number, correlation_id / externalIncidentId
  • Incident fields: short_description, description, state, priority, impact, urgency, category, subcategory
  • Assignment fields: assigned_to, assignment_group
  • Timestamps and duration fields as configured (e.g., opened/closed times, business duration)

Data transferred outside ServiceNow

When configured by an administrator, the application sends incident change information to an external service endpoint (Alation) over HTTPS for synchronization.

How data is used

Used to synchronize incidents between ServiceNow and the external Alation service and to notify changes.

Data storage and retention outside ServiceNow

Incident data transmitted by this application may be processed and stored by Alation in cloud infrastructure hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS), including managed relational databases (Amazon RDS).

Data is retained only as required to support the configured integration features. Upon customer request to delete their data, Alation deletes the corresponding stored data from its systems in accordance with its data deletion and retention policies.

Security

  • HTTPS/TLS for data in transit
  • OAuth 2.0 authentication for API access
  • Signed requests for registration (HMAC) where applicable
  • Secrets are stored in protected ServiceNow configuration properties and restricted to administrators

Alation Privacy policy

Partner privacy policy

Contact

Contact for app security issues: security@alation.com
sys_ui_page.name: app_privacy_policy
